Plots.title: Available Plots
Plots.headline: Planned Plots
Plots.subline: Explore our best plots for your family's dream home or commercial venture.

general.title: Standard Residential Plot
general.description: Quiet and peaceful residential plots located in inner blocks. Ideal for building multi-family homes or duplexes.

avenue.title: Avenue Residential Plot
avenue.description: Attractive plots facing the main 60 and 40-feet roads of Ati Model Town. Perfect for premium homes with spacious frontages.
features: Paved roads with modern street lighting
Regular security patrols by society guards

commercial.title: Premium Commercial Plot
commercial.description: High-traffic commercial plots ideal for shopping malls, super shops, bank branches, or medical centers.
features: Located in the heart of commercial zones
Flexible construction guidelines for multi-story buildings

hospital.title: Institutional Special Plot
hospital.description: A dedicated 1.5-acre zone for healthcare facilities, securing medical services for Keraniganj and South Dhaka.
features: Modern drainage systems for waste disposal
Wide access roads for emergency vehicles

Plots.customText: We allocate custom plot sizes for corporate offices and large estates. Contact us today.

Amenities.title: Civic Amenities
Amenities.headline: All Modern Lifestyle Amenities
Amenities.subline: Ati Model Town features modern amenities and utilities to ensure a comfortable civic life.
Amenities.introText: Ati Model Town is not just a housing project. It is a planned self-sufficient community featuring quality education, healthcare, and civic services.

school.title: Educational Institutes
features: Own school bus service for students

mall.title: Shopping Mall
mall.description: All shopping needs close to home.
features: Wide range of groceries and cosmetic items
Food court and children's play zones

park.title: Parks & Lakes
park.description: Lush green parks and lakes for recreation.

club.title: Sports Club & Gym
club.description: Modern gym and indoor sports area.

Amenities.lifestyleText: Imagine a neighborhood where your children can walk safely to school, where healthcare is just a step away, and scenic parks are at your doorstep. We have created a beautiful habitat combining green spaces with modern amenities for your family.

points.title: RAJUK Approved & Legal
points.text: Every plot is backed by clear CS, RS, and BS mutation records, ensuring smooth and hassle-free ownership transfer.

points.title: Ready Infrastructure
points.text: All utilities are ready, including paved roads, electricity, water, and structured drainage systems.

points.title: Secure Gated Community
points.text: 24/7 security guards and CCTV surveillance ensure the safety of your family and properties.

points.title: Strategic Connectivity
points.text: Excellent connectivity with major highways allows easy access to all parts of Dhaka city.

items.quote: Buying a plot here was the best decision for my family. The paperwork was completely transparent and mutation was completed in less than a month.
items.author: Kamrul Hasan

items.quote: As an expat, I was worried about buying land in Dhaka. But ATI Society delivered exactly what was promised with clear deeds and timely development.
items.author: Dr. Salma Begum

items.quote: The internal roads are wide, and the central park is excellent. Having a school inside the project makes it very convenient for my kids.
items.author: Naimur Rahman

items.quote: We launched our retail shop here last year. The community response is great, and it has been a highly profitable commercial spot.
items.author: Mohammad Ali

items.quote: A serene environment, yet very well connected to central Dhaka. Highly recommended.
items.author: Tahmina Chowdhury

Location.headline: Our Location
Location.description: Ati Model Town is strategically located in Keraniganj, Dhaka, away from the city's congestion but offering excellent highway connectivity.

CtaBand.headline: Secure Your Plot Before Phase 2 Sells Out

About.title: About Us
About.storyText: For 16 years, ATI Society has been a trusted developer of residential properties in Keraniganj. Our journey began with a vision of creating a planned community. Today, Ati Model Town is home to over 25,000 people, standing as a testament to legal transparency, high-quality development, and comfortable living.
About.valueTransparencyText: We guarantee dispute-free land. Every plot is individually mutated and RAJUK-approved, giving you absolute peace of mind.
About.valueQualityText: Unlike other projects, we pave internal roads and lay drainage and utility networks before plot handovers, allowing immediate construction.
About.valueCommunityText: Schools, health clinics, commercial spaces, and recreation parks are integrated into the master plan for self-sufficient living.
About.complianceText: Ati Model Town is a RAJUK-approved layout project. All land is purchased with clear chain of deeds, mutated under CS, RS, and BS records. We ensure fast registration and mutation processes for all new buyers.

team.title: Leadership & Management
team.subtitle: Meet the visionaries and professionals driving the development of Ati Model Town.

Footer.tagline: Building secure, green, and structured communities since 2010.
